content.en:
Knowing these two paths of improvement, Ye Tian is not confused about the future.

Of course, he is not in a hurry to take these two paths.

He still has room for improvement, and when there is no room for improvement, he will take the change of his own path, so that his own path can reach hundreds of millions of changes, and let his own Dao become a kind of Dao origin of the Origin Realm Sea.

Subsequently, Ye Tian said goodbye to the Snow Girl, returned to his residence, and continued to practice.

Time passes.

Ye Tian relied on the affinity of the Dao to master more and more changes in the Dao, and from time to time he created a top-notch Origin Control Technique.

In this way, Ye Tian slowly accumulated strength.

His strength was also gradually slowly improving from the level of the Eight Realms level of controllers, and he was progressing step by step towards the level of the Nine Realms level masters.

After a long time, Ye Tian's many Dao Dao have mastered more than 100 million changes, and his foundation is already extremely strong.

At this time, he can choose to take the path of self-creation and change.

"The Tao I created is the Endless Dao, and now I can continue to follow this path, combining the Tao of time, the Tao of space, and many other Dao to create a new Endless Dao, and then perceive the changes of the Endless Dao. "

Ye Tian muttered.

However, even if he wanted to take the path of Endless Dao changes, if he wanted to completely perfect the Endless Dao, and then master the changes of the Endless Dao on hundreds of millions of kinds, it would still be very difficult, and it would take countless years.

Therefore, for a long time in the future, Ye Tian's strength will not be able to improve quickly.

Of course, if he has the opportunity to get more statues of Ten Thousand Phases, he can continue to improve his strength.

He devoured the juvenile Wanxiang Lin Dragon, if it was the physique of the Wanxiang Lin Dragon, if he obtained more Wanxiang statues, he could also easily urge it, so that his strength could be greatly improved.

If you obtain nine different statues of ten thousand phases, you can also form a terrifying secret technique and make your own strength soar.

The so-called secret technique is also a special and powerful secret technique that belongs to the Wanxiang Linlong, and now he already knows that the Wanxiang Linlong clan has nine inheritance secret techniques, each of which can make the strength skyrocket.

And if you get nine Myriad Statues and synthesize one, you can get one of them at random, which will increase your strength a lot.

This is one of the reasons why the nine statues of all phases are of high value.

But if there is a single statue of Ten Thousand Phases, the value is average, and it can't attract the Nine Realms-level Masters and the Ten Realms-level Controllers.

Therefore, Ye Tian was also inquiring about the whereabouts of the statue of Wanxiang.

Time passed, and after a long time, Ye Tian really inquired about the whereabouts of the statue of the Ten Thousand Worlds.

"The Jiehe Chamber of Commerce is actually going to auction the statue of Ten Thousand Phases!"

Ye Tian said in surprise.

It was not the first time that Ye Tian had dealt with the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce, once when he was on the thirteenth Boundary River, he went to the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce to buy items.

The power of the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce is spread across the eighty-eight Boundary Rivers, and it is the first great existence in the Origin Boundary Sea to open up the Boundary River-Boundary Ancestor!

The Realm Ancestor and the Ten Elements Ancestor and the Primordial Ancestor are all at the same level of existence, surpassing the Ten Realm-level controllers, and the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce is his industry.

Of course, the Realm Ancestor will not manage the Jie River Chamber of Commerce now, and it is the Realm Ancestor's eldest disciple Yuan Demon Ancestor who is managing the Jie River Chamber of Commerce.

At present, the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce has two Tenth-level controllers, and there are dozens of Ninth Realm-level controllers, and their strength is extremely terrifying, so no force dares not to give face to the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce.

Because of this, there are branches of the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce in the eighty-eight boundary rivers.

This time, it was the headquarters of the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce that held an auction, and those who were eligible to participate in this kind of auction were all those above the seventh realm.

In the Origin Realm Sea, the controllers above the seventh realm are all middle-level, and only those above the seventh-realm level are high-level.

And the headquarters of the Jiehe Chamber of Commerce entertained high-level controllers.

If it was before, Ye Tian would not have been qualified to be entertained by the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce, but now that his realm as a Realm Leader of the Eight Realms has been exposed, he received an invitation from the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce as soon as possible.

This time, Ye Tian not only accepted the invitation of the Jiehe Chamber of Commerce, but also obtained a list of some auction items, one of which was the statue of Wanxiang.

"The statue of Wanxiang is very valuable to me, and I can go to this auction. "

Ye Tian decided.

And last time he and the fourth senior sister exterminated the Futian Sect, so he also gained a lot, and now his net worth is not cheap, although it is not as good as the Nine Realms-level controllers, but it is not less than the entire net worth of any Eight Realm-level controllers.

Therefore, if he bids for the statue of Wanxiang, he can still easily bid for it.

The auction is scheduled to take place after a Boundary River Year, and the advance notice of a Boundary River Year is also to give the Eternal Masters enough time to prepare.

And such an auction uses barter.

As for a currency like the Boundary River Coin, it has no meaning at all for those who control it above the Seventh Realm, and they can't usually buy resources suitable for themselves in the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce, so it has no value.

Therefore, it is only possible to take the barter.

Time passed, and soon a boundary of years passed.

this day.

Ye Tian went to the headquarters of the Jiehe Chamber of Commerce, Jiehe City!

Jiehe City is all subordinate to the Jiehe Chamber of Commerce, and countless powerhouses of the Jiehe Chamber of Commerce live here.

Ye Tian came to Jiehe City, the replication talent unfolded, and he sensed a large number of strong people.

Almost all of them are eternal controllers above the first realm, and there are many masters above the seventh realm, and their strength and aura are very powerful.

"It deserves to be the headquarters of the Jiehe Chamber of Commerce!"

Ye Tian commented secretly.

Soon, one of the Eternal Masters above the Seventh Realm came here.

"Fourth Senior Sister!"

Ye Tian saw the Snow Girl in control, so he walked over.

"Fourth Senior Sister!"

Ye Tian shouted.

The Snow Maiden controller naturally noticed Ye Tian and nodded slightly: "Little junior brother, you are here too!"

Afterwards, Ye Tian and the Snow Maiden were chatting while walking.

From the mouth of the Snow Maiden's master, she learned that she valued a treasure this time, so she wanted to try it.

When she reached the Nine Realms level master, there were very few treasures that attracted her to her.

Now that I have encountered one, I naturally have to compete for one or two.

Every Eternal Master who is invited here has a palace to serve as a temporary dwelling place to rest for a while.

Not long after, the auction was about to begin, and one after another Eternal Masters above the Seventh Realm came to the place where the auction was held at the headquarters of the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce-Sunset Palace.

In the Sunset Palace, a large number of controllers above the seventh realm level gathered, which surprised Ye Tian.

It is usually difficult to see an Eternal Controller above the Seventh Realm, but now there are so many.

It can be said that every Eternal Master here can be regarded as an ancient legend in the outside world.
